# Musayr Form

**Summary**: An Early Miocene carbonate formation in the Midyan Basin.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015]] analyzed the Musayr Formation to study early Miocene carbonate development.

## Depositional Environment

- [[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015]] shallow platform carbonate

## Reservoir Properties



## Key Findings Across Sources

- The Musayr Formation is characterized by intensive chemical compaction and was deposited at approximately 20.5 Ma. ([[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015, p. 22]])

## Conflicting Interpretations Across Sources

- [[2015-koeshidayatullah|Koeshidayatullah, 2015]] chemical compaction, dolomitization
